attempts.summary: Gemini rejected --prompt plus stdin with 'Cannot use both a positional prompt and the --prompt (-p) flag together'.
Gemini rejected --prompt plus @path with the same positional prompt conflict.
cmd.exe mediation of gemini.cmd broke quoted prompt argv boundaries, causing the same positional prompt conflict.
PowerShell argv-array invocation reached Gemini and produced stdout envelope {session_id,response,stats}, but Gemini echoed the payload rather than final validator-result JSON.
Live Validator-B PASS. Wrapper parsed Gemini stdout response and wrote validator-b-result-1.json.

commands.summary: Minimal headless JSON prompt works when invoked directly from PowerShell.
Gemini read-only plan mode works for minimal JSON prompt.
Harness audit passed after wrapper changes.
Whitespace check passed with only CRLF conversion warnings.

stdout_envelope.notes: response is a JSON string. It must contain the validator-result object; wrapper already parses response strings.
